extract: The Bell Tower (Japanese: スズの塔(とう) Suzu Tower), known as the Tin Tower prior to Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver and in English versions of Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl, is a location of Johto positioned in the northeast of Ecruteak City. Ho-Oh formerly perched at the top of this ten-story tower, but flew away after the other tower in the west of Ecruteak City burned down mysteriously. The Bell Tower is an icon of Ecruteak City and a place of high sanctity among people in Johto, with only select people being qualified to enter it.
